posts.text: CONFIRMED: Upper middle class and affluent married households are leaving New York. “Net outmigration was highest for married households with incomes between $100,000 and $500,000 – on a net basis, almost 8,200 such filers moved out of New York in 2024, 0.7% of resident taxpayers in that category. The highest out-migration rates are for households making $500,000 or more – 1% of these taxpayers left the state in 2024.” NYS Comptroller now has a tool to see taxpayers who moved in and out of NY. https://www.osc.ny.gov/reports/taxpayer-migration Married/$100-499K
posts.author: BarbarianCap

posts.text: This post is very effective for blocking idiots.
